Startup India.department: Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT)
Startup India.evidence_note: Startup India is the Government of India startup initiative operated through DPIIT under the Ministry of Commerce and Industry.

DST.evidence_note: Configured from the official Department of Science and Technology website.

BIRAC.evidence_note: BIRAC is a public sector enterprise set up by the Department of Biotechnology, Government of India.
